properties.description: SPACE OPENING ON 19th November 2025** The Oval Centre is a community hub designed to bring people together for social, educational, and creative activities. It typically serves as a welcoming space for local residents to access resources, attend events, and participate in programs that promote wellbeing, learning and community engagement.
